title: EAE implementation audit — do not score unacquired candidates; specs under proposals/
reason: Claims that the EAE was fully operational and ready to score/parse door candidates outran the code. Audit from executable code + fixtures is required. Unacquired candidates must not receive integrity/parse/inventory/score/GEO claims.
decision: Do not score CAND-00031-CGT or CAND-771-GRAB while NOT_ACQUIRED.
Publish eae-implementation-audit.json from code inspection + fixture suites (not Markdown inference).
Formalize rubric profiles under proposals/eae/ as PROPOSAL_NOT_ACTIVATED.
Design append-only passport events under proposals/eae/; do not mutate frozen rc1 passport schema; do not claim in-place history append is non-modifying.
Record honest candidate state: DISCOVERED / NOT_ACQUIRED / no file / no hash / no parse / no inventory / no score / no GEO id.
